response.justification: Bogdan is a very strong candidate whose current role at Stripe, building AI-agent infrastructure and supporting agentic workflows, is a direct and rare match for the core requirement of this position. His background also includes proven success in designing and operating high-throughput distributed systems at scale (Dunnhumby). His Staff Engineer title and experience at top-tier tech companies align perfectly with the seniority level. The only major reservation is the complete lack of Python experience on his resume, which is a 'must-have' skill and should be the primary focus of an initial screening call.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling for agentic workflows at Stripe.
Proven background in high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second.
Current Staff Engineer title at a top-tier company, demonstrating the required seniority and strategic impact.
concerns: Resume completely lacks any mention of Python, a 'must-have' skill for the role.
Heavy focus on the niche DLang programming language in personal and past professional projects.
The 'Founder, Datadog' entry for a personal project is confusing and could indicate a lack of clarity in professional communication.
